title: Arciology
description: This is a Modpack all about arceology and combat. Enjoy intense fights with new weapons or search for ancient treasures.
body:
# Archiology
Archiology is a Minecraft modpack that takes players into a world full of mystery and danger. As an adventurous archaeologist, you will go in search of hidden ruins and ancient artifacts. Dig through layers of earth and rock to discover long-forgotten civilizations. But be warned: the ruins are guarded by powerful creatures who will do anything to protect their possessions. Equip yourself, sharpen and upgrade your weapons and face the challenges this world has in store.


## Community
To join our community or report a bug you can join our Discord Server.

[JLCraft Discord Server](https://discord.gg/9HQeX3NdAb)
